subject: implement context pruning and history management in chat sampler
body: Adds logic to manage conversation history, including images and audio, allowing the model's cache to be pruned when exceeding a defined limit. This ensures that multi-turn conversations remain coherent while respecting memory constraints.
changelog_entry: - feat(chat_sampler): Implement context pruning and robust history management for multi-turn chat sessions.
plain_english: The system now remembers more of your conversation over time. If the chat gets too long, it intelligently forgets the oldest parts while keeping track of all media (images/audio) to maintain context.
